owner_source: Mosley official site, VoyageATL interview, and Houzz public profile
source_query: Atlanta GA landscaping public business listing
source_evidence: Collector found public phone, website, and contact page. Mosley official About page says Mosley Architecture & Gardens, formerly Carlson & Mosley Architects, was founded by Lance Carlson and Marc Mosley and serves clients throughout the Eastern United States. The official contact page lists the Atlanta address, office phone, cell phone, and Mosley Architecture Gardens LLC footer. VoyageATL identifies Marc Mosley, gives the same website/phone and marc@mosleyag.com, and quotes him describing the practice as a sole-proprietor full-service design firm covering architecture and landscape design. Houzz lists Mosley Architecture & Gardens at the same Atlanta address and phone with AIA license detail.
visible_gap: Contact page exists, but it is form/phone-led and could use stronger lead-capture follow-up plus a clearer email fallback on the public page.
offer_angle: Architecture and garden-design lead-capture follow-up setup

owner_source: Florida Sunbiz entity detail and public company profiles
source_query: Jacksonville FL locksmith public business listing
source_evidence: Collector found public phone, website, and contact page. The official contact page lists Knowell's Lock and Safe at 2144 Blanding Blvd, Jacksonville, FL 32210, phone 904-387-0042, service request language for free quotes and service calls, and North Florida/Southeast Georgia coverage. Florida Sunbiz lists KNOWELL'S LOCK & SAFE, INC. as active, filed 06/19/1992, with Geoff Knowell as President/CEO, Amanda Argueta as VP, and Gail Davis as Director. Public HomeAdvisor profile says the business has operated since 1978, was founded by Luther Knowell, now has three generations operating the family business, and provides locksmith and safe services in Northeast Florida and Southeast Georgia.
visible_gap: Public contact path is good but still phone-first; add clearer email/follow-up capture and route quote vs service-call intent separately.
